summary: Ultra‑matrix source delivers crystal‑clear sound while Brent Mydland’s keyboard wizardry shines throughout the show.
review: The UltraMatrix recording is praised as superior to any other source, offering exceptional clarity and balance. Fans highlight Brent Mydland’s phenomenal playing and his seamless lead exchanges with Jerry Garcia, indicating a high‑energy performance despite the lack of specific song commentary. Overall the combination of top‑notch audio quality and standout keyboard work makes this release a must‑listen.

ai_rating.rationale: All three reviewers gave high marks (average 4.7) and praised both the recording quality and musical performance, though only a few detailed comments are available.

recording_quality.technical_notes: UltraMatrix described as blowing every other source out of the water; listeners note crisp, balanced sound with no reported issues.

show_quality.setlist_flow: No specific comments on set structure; focus is on overall performance energy and keyboard work.

band_member_comments.Jerry: Garcia trades lead lines with Brent, matching him note for note.
band_member_comments.Keys: Brent Mydland hailed as the best Dead keyboardist ever, with perfect timing and ambiance.
